2604.08118.title: Initialisation Determines the Basin: Efficient Codebook Optimisation for Extreme LLM Quantization
2604.08118.paper_summary: Additive quantization enables extreme LLM compression with O(1) lookup-table dequantization, making it attractive for edge deployment. Yet at 2-bit precision, it often fails catastrophically, even with extensive search and finetuning. We show that the dominant bottleneck is codebook initialisation. Greedy sequential initialisation frequently places the model in poor optimisation regions that subsequent beam search and PV-tuning struggle to overcome. We analyse this behaviour through the representational ratio \r{ho} = N/KM, which characterises the relationship between weight groups and codebook capacity, and propose OA-EM, an output-aware EM initialisation method using Hessian-weighted Mahalanobis distance. Across compression rates, search budgets, and three architectures (Llama 3.2 3B, Llama 3.1 8B, Qwen 2.5 3B), OA-EM consistently produces better solutions after PV-tuning and dominates the quality-compute frontier. The severity of the bottleneck scales with \r{ho}: moderate at 3 bpp but extreme at 2 bpp, where poor initialisation can degrade perplexity by orders of magnitude. More broadly, our results highlight the importance of optimisation geometry in compressed model spaces, where initialisation can dominate subsequent search and fine-tuning.
2604.08118.paper_summary_zh: 加法量化使得極端的 LLM 壓縮成為可能，並且具有 O(1) 查找表解量化的特性，使其在邊緣部署中具有吸引力。然後，在 2 位元精度下，它經常會出現災難性的失敗，即使經過廣泛的搜索和微調。我們顯示出主要的瓶頸是碼本初始化。貪婪的序列初始化常常將模型置於不良的優化區域，後續的束搜索和 PV 調整難以克服。我們通過表示比率 \r{ho} = N/KM 來分析這種行為，該比率表徵了權重組與碼本容量之間的關係，並提出了 OA-EM，一種使用 Hessian 加權的 Mahalanobis 距離的輸出感知 EM 初始化方法。在不同的壓縮率、搜索預算和三種架構（Llama 3.2 3B、Llama 3.1 8B、Qwen 2.5 3B）中，OA-EM 在 PV 調整後始終產生更好的解，並主導質量-計算邊界。瓶頸的嚴重性隨著 \r{ho} 的變化而變化：在 3 bpp 時為中等，但在 2 bpp 時則極端，較差的初始化可能會使困惑度下降幾個量級。更廣泛地說，我們的結果突顯了壓縮模型空間中優化幾何的重要性，在這裡初始化可能主導後續的搜索和微調。
2604.08118.author: Ian W. Kennedy et.al.
2604.08118.authors: Ian W. Kennedy, Nafise Sadat Moosavi
